calibration_seed_policy.problem: the first promotion fold (2022) cannot be calibrated from a nonexistent prior PROMOTION fold
calibration_seed_policy.role: these strictly-pre-2022 folds produce IMMUTABLE RAW OOF predictions that may SEED calibrators; they are NOT promotion folds and never count toward the promotion decision
rules: fit calibrators ONLY on immutable RAW prior-fold OOF predictions + labels + dates
never fit on the evaluated fold
never label a raw fallback as calibrated (if min OOF unmet, the variant is 'raw' and marked calibration_unavailable)

features.schedule_travel: {side}_ctx_ rest_days, games_prior_3d/7d, doubleheader + game_number, travel_miles, tz_shift_hours (IANA DST-aware), day_night (IANA), prior_day_night, night_to_day_turnaround, trip_kind, trip_game_index, trip_is_first_game, prior_venue_id
features.team: {side}_t_* (strict-prior first-inning scoring/prevention, last_10/25/50/career, season-to-date, home/away splits)

missingness: missing numeric -> NaN + explicit missingness indicator; never zero/default-filled; strings dropped from the numeric matrix

models.name: spline_gam
models.note: logistic on fixed-knot (train-quantile [0.1,0.35,0.65,0.9]) natural cubic spline basis of continuous features; deterministic

prediction_cutoff_policy: per-game frozen prediction_cutoff from docs/multiseason_2015_2024/features.jsonl; every feature strictly prior; target game excluded

all_required: primary analysis on admissible-eligible rows; identical rows for model and baseline
improvement vs designated_primary_baseline strictly positive on EVERY promotion fold
family-wise Bonferroni-corrected pooled 95% CI excludes zero
calibration intercept in band on every fold
calibration slope in band on every fold

purpose: A historically promotion-ADMISSIBLE core using ONLY domains that do NOT depend on the unavailable cutoff-known starter identity.

park_and_schedule_travel.note: new context identity recorded after the tz repair; park terminal projection 3dacfdb5 + venue reference d7b9c606 are tz-independent and unchanged

row_eligibility.primary: team_context_eligible (both sides) AND park_context_eligible AND schedule_travel_feature_eligible (both sides). Pitcher/workload/batter eligibility NOT required (excluded).
row_eligibility.secondary: all rows; training-fold-only median imputation + explicit missingness indicators

supersedes: NRFI_CORE_V2_1 (starter-dependent domains found historically inadmissible; V2/V2.1 artifacts preserved)

timezone_policy.determinism: force tzdata-only inside offline build/reproduce processes; clear ZoneInfo cache after path change; NEVER mutate tz search path at module import; deployed Lambda park-only path untouched
timezone_policy.method: effective-dated IANA time zones via zoneinfo
